title: Hayzo Trebors
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Hayzo Trebors''' was an entrepreneur who decided to build an amusement park on [[Aralia/Legends|Aralia]], thinking the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] unpopulated. As construction was started, it was discovered that the [[Ranat/Legends|Ranats]], a large [[Species/Legends|species]] of omnivorous [[Rodent/Legends|rodents]], lived on the planet. The Ranats attacked the workers, the crew was defeated, and the project ended in disaster. Trebors cause the Ranat to be considered a semi-sentient species, because if an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] declared that the Ranat were [[Sentience/Legends|semi-sentient]], more extreme measures could be used to wipe out the intelligent rodents.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-04-03 -->[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]
